name: Ham-Basil Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Smoked or cooked ham, diced
recipeInstructions:
Prebake pie shell for 5 minutes at 400°F.
Mix ham, cheese and basil leaves.
Spread mustard on bottom of prebaked pie shell.
Sprinkle with ham-cheese mixture.
Beat eggs, cream and black pepper. Pour mixture over
ham and cheese in pastry shell. Sprinkle with
Parmesan cheese.
Bake, uncovered, at 350°F on middle level of oven for
30 to 35 minutes until filling is set and lightly
browned. Garnish with fresh basil leaves or parsley
and sliced tomatoes. Serve immediately.
